platform_config.title: Platform Configuration
platform_config.subtitle: Global system parameters
platform_config.max_driver_rate_multiplier_help: Upper limit for custom driver rates (e.g., 2.0 = 2x default)

platform_config.exchange_rate_fallback_cup_help: Fallback USD/CUP rate if no current rate is set
platform_config.quota_deduction_rate_help: Percentage of ride fare deducted from driver's quota (e.g., 0.15 = 15%)
platform_config.quota_warning_threshold_pct_help: Remaining quota percentage that triggers a warning (e.g., 0.20 = 20%)
platform_config.quota_grace_trips_help: Number of trips allowed after quota is depleted before blocking
platform_config.openweather_api_key_help: API key for weather queries. Get one at openweathermap.org
platform_config.weather_surge_enabled_help: Enable/disable automatic fare increase during rain
platform_config.stripe_fee_usd_help: Service fee in USD per recharge
